completed_tasks: Slice 54 merged via PR #98 (squash commit 84e955a); the request-authenticated local-runtime emergency latch plus exact release-bound rollback authority now make A5 gate #13 PASS-capable
remaining_tasks: Slice 55 — §23.3 main control loop + go-live execution under policy (planned, not started)
decisions: Slice 55 is the next planned item after merged Slice 54
A5 gate #13 is PASS-capable under slice54.v1, making all thirteen Appendix-B gates PASS-capable; readiness remains slice20.v1
Slice-54 emergency activation executes only against the current UAID local runtime; it does not stop production infrastructure or prove production incident response
Rollback authority is exact-release-bound and records authorized_not_executed; it performs no connector, broker, deploy, cloud, or production rollback call

Emergency-control principals remain request-authenticated key holders under caller-supplied structured policy, not verified humans or signers; clearing requires a distinct second current policy member
a5_gates_not_all_satisfied remains the sole no-go reason and can_go_live_autonomously remains literal False; Slice 55 alone owns the future control-loop transition
next_action: Draft and submit the Slice 55 plan for review; do not start implementation before approval.
context_notes: Post-Slice-54 checkpoint: implementation main is 84e955a, migration 0053 is the Alembic head, A5 ruleset is slice54.v1, readiness remains slice20.v1, and verified suites are 1083 Docker-free and 826 DB-backed. Gates #1 through #13 are PASS-capable from their respective current evidence paths, but PASS-capable does not mean any project currently passes. Go-live remains hard-false: a5_gates_not_all_satisfied remains the sole no-go reason and can_go_live_autonomously remains the literal False even for a synthetic all-thirteen-pass report. Slice-54's real latch is limited to the current local UAID runtime; its release-bound rollback authorization is recorded but not executed, and its authority tier is request-authenticated key custody under recorded policy rather than a human signature. Repository and ref inspection found no Slice-55 plan, feature branch, control-loop module, test, or migration.
